creator: juanchibarrientos@gmail.com
text:
I have tried to install flashplugin today. 
The Linux Flash Plugins 9 and 10 are unfetchable from the following sites:
http://download.macromedia.com/pub/flashplayer/installers/current/9/
http://fpdownload.macromedia.com/get/flashplayer/current/

Ive checked and no alternative mirrors exists.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/linux-flashplugin9; make fetch
cd /usr/ports/www/linux-f10-flashplugin10; make fetch
